info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Log Analytics
info.description:
This API exposes Azure Log Analytics query capabilities

Contact Support:
 Name: AIAPI Team
 Email: aiapi@microsoft.com

item.name: Microsoft Azure Execute An Analytics Query

query.description: (Required) The Analytics query. Learn more about the [Analytics query syntax](https://azure.microsoft.com/documentation/articles/app-insights-analytics-reference/)
Optional. The timespan over which to query data. This is an ISO8601 time period value.  This timespan is applied in addition to any that are specified in the query expression.

variable.description: (Required) ID of the workspace. This is Workspace ID from the Properties blade in the Azure portal.

request.description: Executes an Analytics query for data

response.name: OK. The API call succeeded and the Analytics query result is in the response payload

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The Analytics query. Learn more about the [Analytics query syntax](https://azure.microsoft.com/documentation/articles/app-insights-analytics-reference/)
Optional. The timespan over which to query data. This is an ISO8601 time period value.  This timespan is applied in addition to any that are specified in the query expression.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Execute An Analytics Query

header.description: Optional. The prefer header to set server timeout, query statistics and visualization information.

variable.description: (Required) ID of the workspace. This is Workspace ID from the Properties blade in the Azure portal.

request.description: Executes an Analytics query for data. [Here](https://dev.loganalytics.io/documentation/Using-the-API) is an example for using POST with an Analytics query.

response.name: OK. The API call succeeded and the Analytics query result is in the response payload

header.description: Optional. The prefer header to set server timeout, query statistics and visualization information.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) ID of the workspace. This is Workspace ID from the Properties blade in the Azure portal.

request.description: Retrieve the metadata information for the workspace, including its schema, functions, workspace info, categories etc.

response.name: OK. The API call succeeded and the metadata result is in the response payload

item.name: Microsoft Azure Execute A Batch Of Analytics Queries

request.description: Executes a batch of Analytics queries for data. [Here](https://dev.loganalytics.io/documentation/Using-the-API) is an example for using POST with an Analytics query.

response.name: OK. The API call succeeded and the Analytics query result is in the response payload

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
